title: Business Analyst
description_text: Gather requirements, document processes, define KPIs, and support operations-focused workflow improvements.

title: Data Analyst
description_text: Analyze operational data, produce dashboards, write SQL queries, and support reporting for business leaders.

title: Product Manager, Analytics
description_text: Own analytics feature requirements, stakeholder alignment, and prioritization with engineering and design.

title: Marketing Manager
description_text: Lead campaign planning, brand messaging, creative reviews, and channel performance strategy.

title: Director, Information Technology
description_text: Own enterprise IT operations, infrastructure, service desk, security, and budget planning.
notes: Too senior and wrong functional lane.
